must_be_driver: You must be the driver of the vehicle.
no_fuel_system: This vehicle has no fuel tank.
out_of_fuel: The engine sputtered and died — out of fuel.
nozzle_taken: Nozzle in hand — go to your fuel cap.
no_fuel_cap: Can't find the fuel cap on this vehicle.
cap_far: Get closer to the fuel cap.
too_far: You pulled the hose too far — nozzle returned.
use_can: Empty the can into the tank
can_cannot_carry: You can't carry a fuel can.
vehicle_far: No vehicle close enough to refuel.
